context_only: ### Additional Limitation: Guard Overrides in Outcome Arrays
### Guard/Action Override Extraction from Outcome Arrays

tasks.title: Extract behavior overrides from outcome arrays in classifyPlanValues()
tasks.description: When an outcome array contains class-keyed entries (guards, actions) alongside 'outcome', extract them into $overrides so they get registered in the container. This is a bug fix — currently these overrides are silently ignored.
tasks.acceptance: classifyPlanValues() extracts class-keyed entries from outcome arrays into $overrides. Static test #5 verifies guard override in outcome array is applied during @fail routing. composer quality passes.
tasks.closed_reason: classifyPlanValues() extracts class-keyed entries from outcome arrays into $overrides via array_filter with ARRAY_FILTER_USE_BOTH. Keys 'outcome' and 'output' excluded. 2585 tests pass, 0 PHPStan errors.

tasks.title: Resolve Closure outcome in handleScenarioOutcome()
tasks.description: In MachineDefinition::handleScenarioOutcome(), when the outcome value is a Closure, resolve it via new resolveCallableOutcome() helper that uses InvokableBehavior parameter injection. Signature: fn(ContextManager $context, ...): string.
tasks.acceptance: handleScenarioOutcome() resolves Closure outcome via resolveCallableOutcome() helper using InvokableBehavior::injectInvokableBehaviorParameters(). Closure can type-hint ContextManager, State, EventBehavior. Returns '@done', '@fail', or '@timeout' string.
tasks.closed_reason: resolveCallableOutcome() helper added to MachineDefinition. Uses InvokableBehavior::injectInvokableBehaviorParameters() with triggeringEvent. handleScenarioOutcome() resolves Closure via instanceof check. 2585 tests, 0 errors.

tasks.title: Accept Closure as valid outcome in ScenarioValidator
tasks.description: In ScenarioValidator's checkContinuation() and checkPlanStructure(), add check: outcome arrays (with static or Closure outcome) on non-delegation states are errors. This closes a pre-existing validation gap and naturally accepts Closures on valid delegation states.
tasks.acceptance: checkContinuation() and checkPlanStructure() reject outcome arrays on non-delegation states (closes pre-existing gap). Closure outcomes on delegation states accepted. Tests #8-#9 verify.
tasks.closed_reason: checkContinuation() and checkPlanStructure() now reject outcome arrays on non-delegation states. Closure outcomes on delegation states pass validation. 2585 tests, 0 errors.

tasks.title: Create CallableOutcomeScenario test stub
tasks.description: Create a test stub scenario that uses callable outcome on a delegation state. The Closure checks a context value and returns @done or @fail accordingly. Also need a stub machine with a delegation state that has @fail with guarded retry.
tasks.acceptance: CallableOutcomeScenario stub exists with callable outcome in plan/continuation. Stub machine has delegation state with @done and guarded @fail routing.
tasks.closed_reason: CallableOutcomeMachine: idle→waiting(interactive)→confirming(job, @done→completed, @fail→[IsRetryableGuard]→waiting/failed). CallableOutcomeScenario: continuation with Closure outcome checking context pin. IsRetryableGuard stub (default false). 2585 tests.

tasks.title: Write 7 unit tests for callable outcome
tasks.description: Tests #1-#7: callable @done, callable @fail, context access, callable+guard override, static+guard override (bug fix), @done.{state}, @timeout.
tasks.acceptance: 7 tests pass in ScenarioPlayerTest.php: #1 callable→@done, #2 callable→@fail, #3 InvokableBehavior injection (ContextManager+State+EventBehavior), #4 callable+guard override, #5 static+guard override (bugfix), #6 @done.{state}, #7 @timeout.
tasks.closed_reason: 7 tests pass: #1 callable→@done, #2 callable→@fail→retry, #3 InvokableBehavior injection (context.result=pin_stateKey proves both ContextManager+State injected), #4 callable+guard override, #5 static+guard override bugfix, #6 @done.error via ScenarioTestMachine, #7 @timeout. 2592 tests total.

tasks.title: Write 2 validator tests for Closure acceptance
tasks.description: Tests #8-#9: callable outcome in plan is valid, callable outcome in continuation is valid.
tasks.acceptance: 2 tests pass in ScenarioValidatorTest.php: #8 callable outcome in plan valid, #9 callable outcome in continuation valid.
tasks.closed_reason: 2 tests pass: #8 callable outcome in plan valid (processing is delegation), #9 callable outcome in continuation valid (delegating is delegation). 2594 tests total.

tasks.title: Write QA test #10 for callable outcome
tasks.description: QA test: callable outcome with correct PIN returns @done (reaches final success), wrong PIN returns @fail (reaches retry state). Two sequential runs in one test.
tasks.acceptance: QA test #10 passes: correct PIN (now()->format('dmy')) → @done → final. Wrong PIN ('000000') → @fail → retry state. Both paths verified in single test.
tasks.closed_reason: QA test #10 passes: correct PIN now()->format('dmy') → @done → completed. Wrong PIN '000000' → @fail + IsRetryableGuard=true → waiting (retry). Both in single test with 2 machines. ConfirmEvent + endpoint added. 11 QA tests, 2594 total.

tasks.title: Update documentation for callable outcome feature
tasks.description: Add Callable Outcome section to scenario-plan.md: API, Closure signature, example with Findeks PIN, when to use. Update upgrading.md with 9.6.0 section.
tasks.acceptance: scenario-plan.md has Callable Outcome section with API example and Closure signature. scenario-plan.md has Selective Pause pattern in @continue section (intentional omission = QA interaction point). scenario-endpoints.md has Continuation Branching pattern in Scenario Switching section (pause point + availableScenarios = branch point). upgrading.md has 9.6.0 section documenting callable outcome + guard override extraction bugfix.
tasks.closed_reason: scenario-plan.md: Callable Outcome subsection with API example + Closure injection + guard extraction. Selective Pause pattern under @continue section. scenario-endpoints.md: Continuation Branching pattern under Scenario Switching. upgrading.md: 9.6.0 section with callable outcome, guard override bugfix, validator improvement. 2594 tests.
